[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11111111 a
1 10100001 3
2 10100100 3
3 01101111 6
4 00110001 3
5 01010100 3
6 00000110 2
7 11011111 7

01 00000100 1
12 01001011 4
23 00010000 1
34 01000100 2
45 00000010 1
56 10011001 4
67 01100110 4
70 00000000 a

02 01001110 4
13 00010001 2
24 00010000 1
35 00000110 2 match 6
46 10001001 3
57 11111001 6
60 00100000 1
71 00000000 a

03 00010000 1
14 01010000 2
25 00000000 a
36 10001000 2
47 10101011 5
50 10100001 3 match 1
61 00100100 2
72 00000000 a

04 01010100 3 match 5
15 00000010 1
26 10010000 2
37 11001110 5
40 10100001 3 match 1

62 01100110 4
73 00000000 a

05 00000110 2 match 6
16 00011001 3
27 10010000 2

74 00000000 a
